knowledge_gaps: QE sustained financial asset inflation rather than productive investment, evidenced by flat-to-declining gross fixed capital formation/GDP during record-low real rates.

Genuine normalization succeeding (balance sheet shrinkage to $4-5T via AI-driven productivity boom, fiscal consolidation, or regulatory reform) is the truly under-explored contrarian tail that almost no one is positioned for.
RRP facility dynamics and money market impact

Kalecki profit equation constrains corporate debt serviceability during QT — if fiscal deficits narrow while investment is weak, corporate cash flows deteriorate mechanically, exacerbating Minsky fragility.
Central bank put is measurable via MOVE-VIX ratio (~6-7x vs historical ~4-5x), reflecting inconsistent pricing of the policy backstop across equity and rates vol markets.
Fed vs ECB vs BOJ normalization sequencing

The Ample Reserves framework is a post-hoc rationalization — the Fed backed into it because the corridor system failed in September 2019, not from first-principles derivation. The framework is circular and untested under adverse conditions.
